# Meson cross-compilation file for building picolibc against our
# xv6-rs kernel surface, riscv64 flavor.
#
# Compiler is the homebrew riscv64-elf-gcc — same one we already
# use to build user binaries via crates/kernel/build.rs.
# system = 'xv6rs' is our made-up OS name so picolibc treats us
# as a custom embedded target rather than a Linux variant.

[binaries]
c = 'riscv64-elf-gcc'
ar = 'riscv64-elf-ar'
ld = 'riscv64-elf-ld'
strip = 'riscv64-elf-strip'
nm = 'riscv64-elf-nm'
objcopy = 'riscv64-elf-objcopy'

[host_machine]
system = 'xv6rs'
cpu_family = 'riscv64'
cpu = 'rv64gc'
endian = 'little'

[properties]
needs_exe_wrapper = true
sys_root = ''
skip_sanity_check = true

[built-in options]
c_args = ['-march=rv64gc', '-mabi=lp64', '-mcmodel=medany', '-nostdlib', '-fno-pie', '-static', '-ffreestanding', '-fno-stack-protector', '-fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables', '-fno-builtin', '-Os']
c_link_args = ['-nostdlib', '-static']
